FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7faf4ddc4930>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-24T00:12:56Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-24T00:11:01Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-24T00:12:56Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-24T00:11:01Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/06/24 00:14:20.936353984 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",

2026/06/24 00:14:20.936410469 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/06/24 00:14:20.936433061 {
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936434274 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936447158 new <- list()
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936448069 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936461024 new$width <- width
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936461845 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936487743 new$height <- height
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936488595 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936502200 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936502992 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936516968 new$title <- title
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936517749 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936531445 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936532246 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936546002 new$version <- version
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936546763 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936562442 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936563184 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936577060 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936577891 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936592078 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936607947 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936621901 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936624526 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936645885 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936647008 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936662146 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936663037 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936678016 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936678807 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936713812 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936714814 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936737616 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936738438 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936752584 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936753306 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936767693 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936768564 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936782691 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936783562 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936797087 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936797849 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936811164 new$author <- author
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936811985 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936828719 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936832035 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936857974 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936858946 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936875626 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936876508 "default"))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936893279 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936894041 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936908347 }
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936909470 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936939315 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936960986 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936961878 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936976825 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936977627 }
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936991402 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/24 00:14:20.936992154 }
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937005589 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937006370 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937021649 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937022410 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937042528 domain = NA)
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937043339 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937058027 }
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937058798 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937072393 old$family <- family
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937073305 }
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937086109 version <- old$version
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937086900 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937102029 "2.0")
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937102850 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937136841 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937139446 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937161617 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937162569 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937177186 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937178038 domain = NA)
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937199478 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937200480 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937263107 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937264739 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937281451 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937282022 old$author)
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937291750 invisible()
2026/06/24 00:14:20.937292241 }
